DOJO LIST

Karate Dojos & Classes in Kita Ward, Sapporo

Inquiries: TEL 011-300-0048 (weekdays 1:00 PM–4:00 PM)

Dojo / Branch Address / Venue Training Days
1 ★ ARCS Kita Karate Club ARCS Kita 24-jo Store 2F, Kita 24-jo Nishi 9-chome, Kita-ku, Sapporo Thursday 15:45Saturday 15:30
2 ★ Shinoro Karate Club Shinoro Community Center 2F, Shinoro 3-jo 8-chome, Kita-ku, Sapporo Saturday 13:30Thursday 15:50
3 ★ Ainosato Karate Club Takuhoku Kaikan, Ainosato 4-jo 6-chome, Kita-ku, Sapporo Thursday 18:30
4 ★ Minami-Ainosato Karate Club Takuhoku Ainosato District Center, Ainosato 1-jo 6-chome, Kita-ku, Sapporo Sunday 10:00 (10:30 in winter)
5 □ Sumiyoshi-juku Azabu Dojo Azabu Children's Hall, Kita 39-jo Nishi 5-chome, Kita-ku, Sapporo Saturday 19:00
6 □ Sumiyoshi-juku Shinkotoni / Shinkawa Class Shinkotoni-Shinkawa District Center, Shinkotoni 2-8, Kita-ku, Sapporo Sunday 10:00
7 □ Sumiyoshi-juku Tonden Class Tonden District Center, Tonden 5-jo 6-chome, Kita-ku, Sapporo Sunday 10:00
  • ★Headquarters-run class — inquiries to the head office
  • ●Instructor-dispatch class — inquiries to the hosting cultural center / sports club
  • □Self-managed dojo — inquiries to the office or directly to the dojo manager

Sumiyoshi-juku Class Introduction Pages

  • Sumiyoshi-juku Azabu Dojo
  • Sumiyoshi-juku Shinkotoni / Shinkawa Class
  • Sumiyoshi-juku Tonden Class

Seishinkai

NPO All Japan Seishinkai Karate Federation

  • 2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo
  • TEL 011-300-0048（Mon–Fri 13:00–16:00）
  • FAX 011-300-0094
  • Karate@seishinkan.ne.jp
